release.title: Ease-of-Use Release
release.summary: Greyhound-first daily scanning, simple bet confirmation, and a clean placed-bet ledger.

features.label: Scan Day
features.note: The main workflow scans a greyhound day and returns the top five safest, value, and longshot bets.

features.label: Scoring Model
features.note: The six-factor scoring model still powers ranking and confidence across the three bet classes.

features.label: Placed Bet Ledger
features.note: Only explicitly confirmed bets are stored in the live ledger and included in P/L.

features.label: Result Tracking
features.note: Placed bets support automatic result scraping plus manual win, loss, and scratched overrides.

features.label: Auto Result Resolution
features.note: Automatic result resolution is active for the ledger, but still depends on source page availability and runner-name parity.

features.label: Per-Race Research Console
features.note: The old per-race research workflow has been retired from the primary product.

features.label: Prediction Journal
features.note: Journal capture is no longer part of the simplified scan-and-stake workflow.

features.label: Box Bias Analytics
features.note: Dedicated box-bias tooling is no longer exposed in the primary product.

features.label: Source Health Dashboard
features.note: Source trust is now shown inline on picks instead of through a separate dashboard.

features.label: Docker Runtime
features.note: Docker is supported through a multi-stage production image that builds the client before slimming the runtime.

features.label: Startup Scripts
features.note: The local launcher scripts still start the canonical raceedge app.

features.label: AI Form Analyst
features.note: AI analysis remains intentionally disabled and is not part of the simplified product.

greyhound.note: Primary greyhound source with parser, meeting, and result fixture coverage.
Cross-code source with parser fixture coverage and active use in the merge.
Best-effort static scraper with sparse coverage; keep visible with warning badges.
Puppeteer-backed market and form scrape; selectors may drift with site changes.
Supplementary source retained for extra coverage, not as a primary trust source.
Supplementary source with limited reliability evidence.
